examples: You can go ahead with the plan.
Go ahead and start without me.
The wedding is going ahead next month.
The meeting will go ahead as scheduled.
They went ahead despite the warnings.
The project went ahead without approval.
The event went ahead despite the rain.
She went ahead and booked the tickets.
The show will go ahead tonight.
go ahead.synonyms:
Продолжать, действовать - proceed, continue, advance
Происходить, состояться - take place, happen, occur
